name: YNX Bridge
title: YNX Bridge | Cross-chain Evidence and Recovery
metaDescription: Review YNX cross-chain route availability, lifecycle evidence, exposure limits, reconciliation, and recovery status.
features: fail-closed route and token allowlist catalogs
source-qualified local status and support readiness
failure, retry, recovery, and dispute evidence
risks: no external Bridge route is currently enabled
operator reconciliation is not independent proof
provider, contract, finality, signer, and liquidity risk require route-specific review

faq.question: Is YNX Bridge live?
faq.answer: No. The current coordinator is a local engineering candidate and external submission is disabled.

faq.question: When is a transferred asset available?
faq.answer: Only after destination confirmation. A quote, source acceptance, source finality, attestation, or provider callback is insufficient.

faq.question: Is CCTP available for YNX?
faq.answer: No YNX route was listed in the inspected official CCTP testnet contract reference as of 2026-07-22, so the route is unavailable.

faq.question: How are failures handled?
faq.answer: The lifecycle records failure, retry, refund or recovery, and dispute evidence without hiding an unresolved state.
